things.name: Djenne Great Mosque
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest mud-brick building - the crown of Saharan architecture

things.name: Timbuktu Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage legendary Saharan city with 16th-century Islamic manuscripts

things.name: National Museum of Mali
things.description: Dogon tribe masks, Bamana art and Saharan artefacts in beautiful outdoor gardens

things.name: Bamako Grand Marche
things.description: Largest market in West Africa with Malian cloth, gold jewellery and calabash bowls

things.name: Point G Hill & Petroglyphs
things.description: Sacred hill above the city with prehistoric rock engravings

things.name: Malian Music at Hogon
things.description: World-class live music - Mali produces Oumou Sangare, Ali Farka Toure and Salif Keita

things.name: Niger River Pirogue Trip
things.description: Sunset boat trip on the Niger passing fishing villages and hippos

things.name: Musee Muso Kunda (Women's Museum)
things.description: Museum of traditional Malian women's arts and daily life

things.name: Dogon Country Trekking
things.description: 7-day trek through the Bandiagara Escarpment villages - one of Africa's greatest walks

things.name: Tô with Sauce (Pearl Millet Porridge)
things.description: Mali's staple dish - stiff millet paste with peanut sauce and dried fish
